description: Request body to dispatch an async audit run (POST /v1/audit/runs, audit_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). All fields are optional: an empty body runs the full audit against all rules and files.

rule_ids.description: Optional filter: only evaluate these rule IDs. Empty list means all rules.

policy_ids.description: Optional filter: only evaluate rules governed by these policy IDs.

files.description: Optional filter: restrict audit scope to these file paths.

force_llm.description: Force LLM-gate evaluation even when cache would short-circuit it.

wait.description: If true, block until the run completes and return the full run result.

source.description: Caller identifier recorded on the run row. Defaults to 'api'.
